nodes.name: Weekly Monday 7am IST
nodes.notes: Fires at 01:30 UTC = 07:00 IST every Monday. Weekly batch — you review + approve with Sachit mid-week.

nodes.name: Google Trends: CA Keywords
nodes.notes: Set SERPAPI_KEY in n8n env vars. Free tier: 100 searches/month. Sign up at serpapi.com

nodes.name: Reddit: India Investments Trending
nodes.notes: Public Reddit API. No auth needed. Returns top 20 hot posts from r/IndiaInvestments.

nodes.name: Process Each Topic (Loop)
nodes.notes: Output 0 = current topic, Output 1 = all done

parameters.rawBody:
={{
JSON.stringify({
  model: 'claude-sonnet-4-6',
  max_tokens: 3500,
  messages: [{
    role: 'user',
    content: `You are a social media content creator for SNG Advisors targeting Indian CA professionals. Create content for:

TOPIC: ${$json.title}
WHY IT MATTERS: ${$json.why}
UNIQUE ANGLE: ${$json.angle}

Create all 4 formats below using the exact section headers.

---LINKEDIN---
LinkedIn post (900-1100 chars). Bold hook first line. Short paragraphs 2-3 lines max. 1-2 emojis. Professional but conversational. Clear CTA (save this / comment below / share with your team). No hashtags.

---INSTAGRAM_CAPTION---
Instagram caption (180-220 chars). Punchy opener. 2 sentences. Then on a NEW line: 22-25 hashtags. Examples: #CAIndia #GSTUpdate #AIForCA #TaxAutomation #CharteredAccountant #SNG #FloatupApp #IndiaFinance #TaxIndia #ICampAI

---CAROUSEL_SLIDES---
Instagram carousel: exactly 5 slides. Each slide on its own line, format:
Slide1: [HOOK — bold claim or question, max 8 words]
Slide2: [Point 1 — headline + 1 supporting sentence]
Slide3: [Point 2 — headline + 1 supporting sentence]
Slide4: [Point 3 — headline + 1 supporting sentence]
Slide5: [CTA — action for viewer, + @SNG or #FloatupApp]

---YOUTUBE_SHORTS---
YouTube Shorts script (60-75 seconds when read aloud at conversational pace). Format:
HOOK (0-3s): [attention-grabbing opening line — a bold claim or question]
POINT1 (3-20s): [first key insight with one specific example or stat]
POINT2 (20-40s): [second insight]
POINT3 (40-55s): [third insight or practical tip]
CTA (55-75s): [subscribe + comment prompt + mention SNG Advisors]

---IMAGE_PROMPT---
Write one image generation prompt for this topic. Style: clean infographic, dark navy background (#0a0a1a), purple (#7c3aed) and teal (#0d9488) accents, white text, modern SaaS aesthetic, no stock photos. Include 3 key data points or steps from the content. Under 80 words.

Return ONLY the 5 sections with their headers. No preamble.`
  }]
})
}}

nodes.name: Code: Collect All Posts
nodes.notes: Connected from SplitInBatches Done output (all topics processed)

parameters.rawBody:
={{ const posts = $json.posts || []; const postCards = posts.map((p,i) => `
${p.topic_rank} ${p.topic_title}

Angle: ${p.topic_angle}

LinkedIn draft (${(p.linkedin_draft||'').length} chars)
${(p.linkedin_draft||'').substring(0,600)}...
Instagram + Carousel
${(p.instagram_draft||'').substring(0,300)}\n\nCarousel slides:\n${(p.carousel_slides||[]).map((s,j)=>`${j+1}. ${s}`).join('\n')}
YouTube Shorts script
${(p.youtube_script||'').substring(0,500)}...

Image prompt: ${(p.image_prompt||'').substring(0,150)}...

`).join(''); JSON.stringify({ from: 'Floatup Content ', to: ['saksham.gpt2001@gmail.com'], subject: `📅 This week's ${posts.length} content drafts — week of ${$json.weekOf}`, html: `

Weekly Content Digest

Week of ${$json.weekOf} · ${posts.length} topics drafted for LinkedIn, Instagram (carousel) and YouTube Shorts

Your weekly session with Sachit: Review the drafts below, generate carousel images in Canva using the slide copy, record/generate YouTube Shorts from the script, then approve posts in the dashboard.
${postCards} Open Approval Dashboard →

Generated ${new Date().toLocaleString('en-IN',{timeZone:'Asia/Kolkata'})} IST · SNG Advisors / Floatup

` }) }}

nodes.name: Resend: Weekly Digest Email
nodes.notes: Sends full digest to saksham.gpt2001@gmail.com once all 5 topics are drafted. Set RESEND_API_KEY.
